Hero — visible immediately

This section is above-the-fold and loads on initial render.

Lazy section 1

Image below loads when scrolled into view via IntersectionObserver.

Same lazy-load mechanism — content fills in on scroll.

Lazy section 3

Test that recorder.screenshotSegments() captures the loaded content, not the placeholder.

Lazy section 4

Tests that triggerLazyLoad() scrolls all the way through before capturing.

Footer

Bottom marker — used to verify segment-count math reaches the end.
